posts.title: Sudhakar Sutar: FinWise Smart Financial Advisor
posts.meta: Featured · Candidate Log · L4 to L6 Validated
posts.intro: Sudhakar Sutar is a Pune-based builder who validated L4 in February, L5 in March, and L6 on 6 April in Stellar Journey to Mastery.
posts.targetProject: FinWise: a smart financial advisor with AI-based user guidance and a streak-based piggy bank feature.
posts.why: He wanted to help users build stronger money habits with practical guidance instead of generic finance tips.
posts.how: He combined AI advice with a deposit-and-streak piggy bank loop to make saving behavior consistent and measurable.
posts.life: He is focused on shipping practical features, learning fast, and growing through real community collaboration.

posts.title: Ankit Kumar: StellarVaultt Green Belt Build
posts.meta: Featured · Candidate Log · Stellar Journey to Mastery
posts.intro: Ankit Kumar (@UnrealAnkit) is a Noida-based CSE'28 student at IILM, founder at Qfuss, ex-Sanity Gaming, ex-AIPivot, and currently building DevDock AI.
posts.targetProject: StellarVaultt: reward-token + reward-vault Soroban contracts, one-time SRT claim flow, wallet connect, claim status, and activity tracking.
posts.why: He wanted to build something practical where users can clearly see what is happening and actually trust the reward flow.
posts.how: He built it end-to-end: contracts, frontend, wallet flow, and a live deployed app people can test directly.
posts.life: Doing back-to-back internships, building, shipping, and organizing hackathons.

posts.title: Ansh Singh: Instant Payments for Government Tenders
posts.intro: Ansh Singh is pursuing a B.Tech in ECE at SRM Institute of Science and Technology, Chennai, originally from Sultanpur, Uttar Pradesh.
posts.targetProject: A solution enabling instant contractor payments after government work approval to reduce delays and improve transparency.
posts.why: Payments in many government tenders are delayed even after work completion, creating friction and uncertainty for contractors.
posts.how: He is designing an approval-triggered payment flow on Stellar to make transactions smoother, faster, and more transparent.
posts.life: He is focused on building real-life projects in emerging domains and wants to collaborate and contribute as a community partner.
